gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/191)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/191)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ وَ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولَانِ مَا عَلَى وَجْهِ الْأَرْضِ ثَمَرَةٌ كَانَتْ أَحَبَّ إِلَى رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) مِنَ الرُّمَّانِ وَ كَانَ وَ اللَّهِ إِذَا أَكَلَهَا أَحَبَّ أَنْ لَا يَشْرَكَهُ فِيهَا أَحَدٌ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Abu Abdullah, from his father, from Fazalat Bin Ayoub, from Umar Bin Aban Al Kalby who said,

‘I heard Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> and Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> both<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘There is no fruit upon the surface of the earth more beloved to Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> than the Pomegranate, and, by Allah<sup>azwj</sup> whenever I<sup>asws</sup> have eat it I<sup>asws</sup> love it that no one else should participate in it with me’.
en.sarwar: 3. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn abu ‘Abd Allah from his father from Fadalah ibn from ‘Umar ibn Aban al- Kalbiy who has said the following: “I once heard abu Ja‘far, and abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhim al-Salam, saying, ‘No other fruit on earth was as much desirable to the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, as pomegranate. He (the Messenger of Allah) liked not to share it with anyone.’”
